sr.title: Ljudi i struktura pokreta
sr.description: Mock podaci za nacionalne organe, lokalne odbore i individualne profile. Stvarna imena i funkcije se mogu zamijeniti kada sadržaj bude potvrđen.

en.title: People and movement structure
en.description: Mock data for national bodies, local boards and individual profiles. Real names and roles can be replaced once the content is confirmed.

sr.name: Milojko Spajić
sr.bio: Predsjednik Pokreta Evropa sad i nosilac ekonomskih reformi koje su obilježile prvu fazu javnog predstavljanja sajta.

en.name: Milojko Spajić
en.bio: President of the Europe Now Movement and the public figure tied to the economic reforms highlighted in the first website phase.

sr.name: Predstavnica predsjedništva
sr.bio: Privremeni profil za provjeru kartica osoba dok se ne unesu potvrđeni podaci.

en.name: Presidency representative
en.bio: Temporary profile used to test person cards until confirmed data is entered.

sr.name: Predstavnik glavnog odbora
sr.bio: Privremeni profil za prikaz organizacione strukture i buduće integracije sa CRM-om.

en.name: Main board representative
en.bio: Temporary profile for displaying organizational structure and future CRM integration.

sr.title: Predsjedništvo
sr.description: Političko rukovodstvo pokreta i tim koji vodi strateške odluke.

en.title: Presidency
en.description: The movement's political leadership and the team responsible for strategic decisions.

sr.title: Glavni odbor
sr.description: Šire predstavničko tijelo za programska i organizaciona pitanja.

en.title: Main board
en.description: A broader representative body for program and organizational matters.

sr.title: Izvršni odbor
sr.description: Operativno tijelo zaduženo za sprovođenje odluka i koordinaciju aktivnosti.

en.title: Executive board
en.description: Operational body responsible for implementing decisions and coordinating activities.

sr.title: Nadzorni odbor
sr.description: Tijelo za nadzor rada i poštovanja internih procedura.

en.title: Supervisory board
en.description: Body responsible for oversight and internal procedure compliance.

sr.title: Statutarna komisija
sr.description: Komisija zadužena za statut, tumačenja i normativna pitanja.

en.title: Statutory commission
en.description: Commission responsible for the statute, interpretations and normative questions.
